reviews.comment:
Hacen hace fila de autos en la Calle y atienden de a 2 autos. Nunca visto!!!! Ademas la forma de atender....

(Translated by Google)
They make a line of cars on the street and serve two cars at a time. Unbelievable! And the way they serve...

reviews.comment:
No tienen para revisar aire en las cubiertas,  no adhieren al dto. de cuenta dni.
Los empleados atienden bien.

They don't have a tire pressure checker, and they don't accept the discount for ID card accounts.
The employees provide good service.

reviews.comment:
Primero YPF es la mejor, segundo ACA Miramar tiene gente trabajando que da gusto cargar ahí, con una honestidad pocas veces vista

(Translated by Google)
First, YPF is the best, second, ACA Miramar has people working there who are a pleasure to load, with an honesty rarely seen.

reviews.comment:
Un lugar bien atendido,excelente para desayunar

(Translated by Google)
A well-run place, excellent for breakfast.

reviews.comment:
Hace rato que no hago fila para cargar combustible mucha venta o poco personal

(Translated by Google)
It's been a while since I've had to wait in line for fuel; too many sales or too few staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXa01iVXJBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Demora en la atención.Larga fila.Mejorar la limpieza de los baños.

(Translated by Google)
Slow service. Long lines. Improve the cleanliness of the restrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXd1BycW1nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar para además hacer una pequeña parada para tomar unos mates. Cuenta con un kiosco

(Translated by Google)
A nice place to stop for a quick mate break. It also has a kiosk.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXZ0szNkx3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy concurrida (al menos en temporada). Poco personal. La última vez que fuimos había habilitado un surtidor y una persona para una cola de 10 autos. Nos demoramos un buen rato.

(Translated by Google)
Very busy (at least during peak season). Understaffed. The last time we went, they had only one pump open and one person for a line of 10 cars. We were delayed for quite a while.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXZ01xdzBBRRAB

reviews.comment:
La verdad lamentablemente lo de la Ypf y el personal que tienen, muy mal educados los que cargan combustible

(Translated by Google)
Unfortunately, the situation at YPF and their staff is terrible; those who pump fuel are very rude.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXZ0x6Ri13RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención ,pero vayan con anticipación y mucha paciencia  siempre hay fila de 2 cuadras de autos para cargar combustible

(Translated by Google)
Good service, but go early and be very patient. There is always a line of cars two blocks long to fill up with fuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtXzZuczFnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Punto negativo: la atención en el kiosko un desastre( mala onda) y tenes que haces mucha fila para cargar nafta perdiendo un montón de tiempo. Punto positivo: agua caliente gratis.

(Translated by Google)
Negative point: the service at the gas station is terrible (unfriendly) and you have to wait in a long line to get gas, wasting a lot of time. Positive point: free hot water.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtdjdTemhBRRAB
